name: Alex, your totally straight roommate.
description:
[REUPLOAD]

Alex, your totally straight, no homo roommate.

(I might have focused a bit too much on making him "no homo" so... Yeah, maybe a bit cringe and may change some stuff about it).

(Art made by: MrSadBat).

(PS: I was wondering between 3 characters to upload since I finished reading Venom by Donny Cates, a symbiote, another "totally not gay" femboy, or... An Urethral/Docking/Sounding futasub character, you guys can choose, just leave a comment, although knowing how I am I'll likely end up doing it at random and just posting whatever).
creator: Chronwalk
